Kodi Njira ya Aroma yopita ku cipulumutso ndi ciani?Resourcegot-questions
Azibusa acikazi / wolalikira? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa akazi mu ulaliki?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi a Kristu anenapo bwanji pa nkhani za kudzipha wekha? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pakudzipha wekha?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo ndilo Mau a Mulungu zoonadi?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)? Kodi ndi cimo kwa Mkristu kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za kupereka ca khumi?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi cipulumutso citheka ndi cikhulupiriro cokha kapena cikhulupiriro ndi zinchito?Resourcegot-questions
Cifukwa ninji sindiyenera kudzipha?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Cikristu nciani ndipo Akristu amakhulupirira ciani?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Akristu ayenera kumvera lamulo la mu Cipangano Cakale?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za cikwati pakati pa osiyana mitundu (osiyana khungu)?Resourcegot-questions
Cimacitika nciani potsatira imfa?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi mpikisano wobecha (njuga, kasino, lotare, jakipoti ndi zina) ndi cimo? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mpikisano wobecha?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi cipembedzo coona ndi citi kwa ine?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi cisamaliro cosatha cipezeka mu Baibulo?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi domgosolo la chipulumutso ndilotani / njira ya chipulumutso?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji cifuniro ca Mulungu mu moyo wanga? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa zakudziwa cifuniro ca Mulungu?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji motsimikiza kuti ndikafa ndidzapita Kumwamba?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi m’Khristu ndi chiyani?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Mulungu alipo? Pali umboni kuti Mulungu alipo?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Mulungu ndi oona? Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji kuti Mulungu ndi oona?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Yesu Khristu ndiye yani?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndi Mulungu? Kodi Yesu ananenapo kuti Iye ndi Mulungu?Resourcegot-questions
Ndingathe bwanji kugonjetsa cimo mu umoyo wanga wa CiKristu?Resourcegot-questions
Ndingakhale bwanji bwino ndi Mulungu?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kukhala m’cikondi munthu asanakwatire kapena asanakwatiridwe / kumacita zogonana asanakhale m’banja?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kulekana pa banja ndi kukwatiranso kapena kukwatiriwanso?Resourcegot-questions
Mwakhululukidwa? Ndingakhululukidwe bwanji ndi Mulungu?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za madainasosi? Kodi madainasosi alimo mu Baibulo?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi malamulo anai a zauzimu ndi otani?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha? Kodi mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha ndi cimo?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali ndani? Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali mlongo wace?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi ubatizo wa Cikristu ndiwofunikira motani?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi munthu akafa, akhalanso ndi moyo?Resourcegot-questions
Munalandira Moyo Wosatha?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi mphatso yakulankhula mu malilime ndi ciani?Resourcegot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kuzitema kapena kuzilembalemba mphini pa thupi kapenanso kuziboola pa thupi?Resourcegot-questions
Zikutanthauza chiyani kuvomera Yesu ngati Mpulumutsi wa umoyo wako?Resourcegot-questions

Okapulumutsidwa kamodzi, ukhalabe wopulumutsidwa?Resourcegot-questions

Ndangoyika chikhulupiliro changa mwa Yesu… Tsopano?Resourcegot-questions
Kuzithetsa nyere – Kodi ndi cimo monga mwa Baibulo?Resourcegot-questions

Kodi citanthauza ciani kukhala Mkristu wobadwa kwa tsopano? Kodi ndingabadwe bwanji kwa tsopano?Resourcegot-questions

TWR360Audiotwr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

Kodi Njira ya Aroma yopita ku cipulumutso ndi ciani?Recursogot-questions
Azibusa acikazi / wolalikira? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa akazi mu ulaliki?Recursogot-questions
Kodi a Kristu anenapo bwanji pa nkhani za kudzipha wekha? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pakudzipha wekha?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo ndilo Mau a Mulungu zoonadi?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)? Kodi ndi cimo kwa Mkristu kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za kupereka ca khumi?Recursogot-questions
Kodi cipulumutso citheka ndi cikhulupiriro cokha kapena cikhulupiriro ndi zinchito?Recursogot-questions
Cifukwa ninji sindiyenera kudzipha?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Cikristu nciani ndipo Akristu amakhulupirira ciani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Akristu ayenera kumvera lamulo la mu Cipangano Cakale?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za cikwati pakati pa osiyana mitundu (osiyana khungu)?Recursogot-questions
Cimacitika nciani potsatira imfa?Recursogot-questions
Kodi mpikisano wobecha (njuga, kasino, lotare, jakipoti ndi zina) ndi cimo? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mpikisano wobecha?Recursogot-questions
Kodi cipembedzo coona ndi citi kwa ine?Recursogot-questions
Kodi cisamaliro cosatha cipezeka mu Baibulo?Recursogot-questions
Kodi domgosolo la chipulumutso ndilotani / njira ya chipulumutso?Recursogot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji cifuniro ca Mulungu mu moyo wanga? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa zakudziwa cifuniro ca Mulungu?Recursogot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji motsimikiza kuti ndikafa ndidzapita Kumwamba?Recursogot-questions
Kodi m’Khristu ndi chiyani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Mulungu alipo? Pali umboni kuti Mulungu alipo?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Mulungu ndi oona? Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji kuti Mulungu ndi oona?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Yesu Khristu ndiye yani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndi Mulungu? Kodi Yesu ananenapo kuti Iye ndi Mulungu?Recursogot-questions
Ndingathe bwanji kugonjetsa cimo mu umoyo wanga wa CiKristu?Recursogot-questions
Ndingakhale bwanji bwino ndi Mulungu?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kukhala m’cikondi munthu asanakwatire kapena asanakwatiridwe / kumacita zogonana asanakhale m’banja?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kulekana pa banja ndi kukwatiranso kapena kukwatiriwanso?Recursogot-questions
Mwakhululukidwa? Ndingakhululukidwe bwanji ndi Mulungu?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za madainasosi? Kodi madainasosi alimo mu Baibulo?Recursogot-questions
Kodi malamulo anai a zauzimu ndi otani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha? Kodi mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha ndi cimo?Recursogot-questions
Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali ndani? Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali mlongo wace?Recursogot-questions
Kodi ubatizo wa Cikristu ndiwofunikira motani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi munthu akafa, akhalanso ndi moyo?Recursogot-questions
Munalandira Moyo Wosatha?Recursogot-questions
Kodi mphatso yakulankhula mu malilime ndi ciani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kuzitema kapena kuzilembalemba mphini pa thupi kapenanso kuziboola pa thupi?Recursogot-questions
Zikutanthauza chiyani kuvomera Yesu ngati Mpulumutsi wa umoyo wako?Recursogot-questions
Kodi baibulo liphunzitsa ciani za Mulungu m’modzi mwa atatu?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Mzimu Woyera ndani?Recursogot-questions
Okapulumutsidwa kamodzi, ukhalabe wopulumutsidwa?Recursogot-questions
Kodi pemphero la munthu ocimwa nciani?Recursogot-questions
Kodi tanthauzo la moyo nciani?” Kodi ndingapeze bwanji tanthauzo la moyo wanga?Recursogot-questions
Ndangoyika chikhulupiliro changa mwa Yesu… Tsopano?Recursogot-questions
Kuzithetsa nyere – Kodi ndi cimo monga mwa Baibulo?Recursogot-questions
Kodi umulungu wa Yesu upezeka mu Baibulo?Recursogot-questions
Kodi citanthauza ciani kukhala Mkristu wobadwa kwa tsopano? Kodi ndingabadwe bwanji kwa tsopano?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Yesu atafa anali kuti asanaukitsidwe pa masiku atatu aja a pakati pa imfa yace ndi kuukitsidwa kwace?Recursogot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndiye njira yokha yopita Kumwamba?Recursogot-questions
Kodi makhalidwe a Mulungu ndi otani? Kodi Mulungu ali bwanji?Recursogot-questions
Kodi ziweto / nyama zimapita Kumwamba? Kodi ziweto / nyama zili ndi mizimu?Recursogot-questions

TWR360Audiotwr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

Nyengo 5 Gawo 8: Chipinda Chapamwamba Gawo IIFilmesthe-chosen
TWR360Áudiotwr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

chewa

TWR360Audiotwr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

Kodi Njira ya Aroma yopita ku cipulumutso ndi ciani?संसाधनgot-questions
Azibusa acikazi / wolalikira? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa akazi mu ulaliki?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi a Kristu anenapo bwanji pa nkhani za kudzipha wekha? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pakudzipha wekha?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo ndilo Mau a Mulungu zoonadi?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)? Kodi ndi cimo kwa Mkristu kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za kupereka ca khumi?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi cipulumutso citheka ndi cikhulupiriro cokha kapena cikhulupiriro ndi zinchito?संसाधनgot-questions
Cifukwa ninji sindiyenera kudzipha?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Cikristu nciani ndipo Akristu amakhulupirira ciani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Akristu ayenera kumvera lamulo la mu Cipangano Cakale?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za cikwati pakati pa osiyana mitundu (osiyana khungu)?संसाधनgot-questions
Cimacitika nciani potsatira imfa?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi mpikisano wobecha (njuga, kasino, lotare, jakipoti ndi zina) ndi cimo? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mpikisano wobecha?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi cipembedzo coona ndi citi kwa ine?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi cisamaliro cosatha cipezeka mu Baibulo?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi domgosolo la chipulumutso ndilotani / njira ya chipulumutso?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji cifuniro ca Mulungu mu moyo wanga? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa zakudziwa cifuniro ca Mulungu?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji motsimikiza kuti ndikafa ndidzapita Kumwamba?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi m’Khristu ndi chiyani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Mulungu alipo? Pali umboni kuti Mulungu alipo?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Mulungu ndi oona? Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji kuti Mulungu ndi oona?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Yesu Khristu ndiye yani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndi Mulungu? Kodi Yesu ananenapo kuti Iye ndi Mulungu?संसाधनgot-questions
Ndingathe bwanji kugonjetsa cimo mu umoyo wanga wa CiKristu?संसाधनgot-questions
Ndingakhale bwanji bwino ndi Mulungu?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kukhala m’cikondi munthu asanakwatire kapena asanakwatiridwe / kumacita zogonana asanakhale m’banja?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kulekana pa banja ndi kukwatiranso kapena kukwatiriwanso?संसाधनgot-questions
Mwakhululukidwa? Ndingakhululukidwe bwanji ndi Mulungu?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za madainasosi? Kodi madainasosi alimo mu Baibulo?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi malamulo anai a zauzimu ndi otani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha? Kodi mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha ndi cimo?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali ndani? Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali mlongo wace?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi ubatizo wa Cikristu ndiwofunikira motani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi munthu akafa, akhalanso ndi moyo?संसाधनgot-questions
Munalandira Moyo Wosatha?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi mphatso yakulankhula mu malilime ndi ciani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kuzitema kapena kuzilembalemba mphini pa thupi kapenanso kuziboola pa thupi?संसाधनgot-questions
Zikutanthauza chiyani kuvomera Yesu ngati Mpulumutsi wa umoyo wako?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi baibulo liphunzitsa ciani za Mulungu m’modzi mwa atatu?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Mzimu Woyera ndani?संसाधनgot-questions
Okapulumutsidwa kamodzi, ukhalabe wopulumutsidwa?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi pemphero la munthu ocimwa nciani?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi tanthauzo la moyo nciani?” Kodi ndingapeze bwanji tanthauzo la moyo wanga?संसाधनgot-questions
Ndangoyika chikhulupiliro changa mwa Yesu… Tsopano?संसाधनgot-questions
Kuzithetsa nyere – Kodi ndi cimo monga mwa Baibulo?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi umulungu wa Yesu upezeka mu Baibulo?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi citanthauza ciani kukhala Mkristu wobadwa kwa tsopano? Kodi ndingabadwe bwanji kwa tsopano?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Yesu atafa anali kuti asanaukitsidwe pa masiku atatu aja a pakati pa imfa yace ndi kuukitsidwa kwace?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndiye njira yokha yopita Kumwamba?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi makhalidwe a Mulungu ndi otani? Kodi Mulungu ali bwanji?संसाधनgot-questions
Kodi ziweto / nyama zimapita Kumwamba? Kodi ziweto / nyama zili ndi mizimu?संसाधनgot-questions

Sezonu 1, Nkhani za 2: Shabbatफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen
Nyengo 5, Gawo 1: Kulowaफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen
Nyengo 5 Gawo 2: Nyumba ya Makadiफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen
Nyengo ya 5, Chidutswa 3: Zisoniफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen

Nyengo 5 Gawo 5: Chifukwa cha Ineफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen

Gawo 5, Episode 7: Chipinda Chapamwamba Gawo Iफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen
Nyengo 5 Gawo 8: Chipinda Chapamwamba Gawo IIफ़िल्मेंthe-chosen
TWR360ऑडियोtwr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

Kodi Mulungu alipo? Pali umboni kuti Mulungu alipo?الموردgot-questions

Kodi malamulo anai a zauzimu ndi otani?الموردgot-questions

TWR360صوتياتtwr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

チェワ語

ISO 639-3
nya
国

Kodi Njira ya Aroma yopita ku cipulumutso ndi ciani?リソースgot-questions
Azibusa acikazi / wolalikira? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa akazi mu ulaliki?リソースgot-questions
Kodi a Kristu anenapo bwanji pa nkhani za kudzipha wekha? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pakudzipha wekha?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo ndilo Mau a Mulungu zoonadi?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)? Kodi ndi cimo kwa Mkristu kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za kupereka ca khumi?リソースgot-questions
Kodi cipulumutso citheka ndi cikhulupiriro cokha kapena cikhulupiriro ndi zinchito?リソースgot-questions
Cifukwa ninji sindiyenera kudzipha?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Cikristu nciani ndipo Akristu amakhulupirira ciani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Akristu ayenera kumvera lamulo la mu Cipangano Cakale?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za cikwati pakati pa osiyana mitundu (osiyana khungu)?リソースgot-questions
Cimacitika nciani potsatira imfa?リソースgot-questions
Kodi mpikisano wobecha (njuga, kasino, lotare, jakipoti ndi zina) ndi cimo? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mpikisano wobecha?リソースgot-questions
Kodi cipembedzo coona ndi citi kwa ine?リソースgot-questions
Kodi cisamaliro cosatha cipezeka mu Baibulo?リソースgot-questions
Kodi domgosolo la chipulumutso ndilotani / njira ya chipulumutso?リソースgot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji cifuniro ca Mulungu mu moyo wanga? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa zakudziwa cifuniro ca Mulungu?リソースgot-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji motsimikiza kuti ndikafa ndidzapita Kumwamba?リソースgot-questions
Kodi m’Khristu ndi chiyani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Mulungu alipo? Pali umboni kuti Mulungu alipo?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Mulungu ndi oona? Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji kuti Mulungu ndi oona?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Yesu Khristu ndiye yani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndi Mulungu? Kodi Yesu ananenapo kuti Iye ndi Mulungu?リソースgot-questions
Ndingathe bwanji kugonjetsa cimo mu umoyo wanga wa CiKristu?リソースgot-questions
Ndingakhale bwanji bwino ndi Mulungu?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kukhala m’cikondi munthu asanakwatire kapena asanakwatiridwe / kumacita zogonana asanakhale m’banja?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kulekana pa banja ndi kukwatiranso kapena kukwatiriwanso?リソースgot-questions
Mwakhululukidwa? Ndingakhululukidwe bwanji ndi Mulungu?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za madainasosi? Kodi madainasosi alimo mu Baibulo?リソースgot-questions
Kodi malamulo anai a zauzimu ndi otani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha? Kodi mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha ndi cimo?リソースgot-questions
Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali ndani? Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali mlongo wace?リソースgot-questions
Kodi ubatizo wa Cikristu ndiwofunikira motani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi munthu akafa, akhalanso ndi moyo?リソースgot-questions
Munalandira Moyo Wosatha?リソースgot-questions
Kodi mphatso yakulankhula mu malilime ndi ciani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kuzitema kapena kuzilembalemba mphini pa thupi kapenanso kuziboola pa thupi?リソースgot-questions
Zikutanthauza chiyani kuvomera Yesu ngati Mpulumutsi wa umoyo wako?リソースgot-questions
Kodi baibulo liphunzitsa ciani za Mulungu m’modzi mwa atatu?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Mzimu Woyera ndani?リソースgot-questions
Okapulumutsidwa kamodzi, ukhalabe wopulumutsidwa?リソースgot-questions
Kodi pemphero la munthu ocimwa nciani?リソースgot-questions
Kodi tanthauzo la moyo nciani?” Kodi ndingapeze bwanji tanthauzo la moyo wanga?リソースgot-questions
Ndangoyika chikhulupiliro changa mwa Yesu… Tsopano?リソースgot-questions
Kuzithetsa nyere – Kodi ndi cimo monga mwa Baibulo?リソースgot-questions
Kodi umulungu wa Yesu upezeka mu Baibulo?リソースgot-questions
Kodi citanthauza ciani kukhala Mkristu wobadwa kwa tsopano? Kodi ndingabadwe bwanji kwa tsopano?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Yesu atafa anali kuti asanaukitsidwe pa masiku atatu aja a pakati pa imfa yace ndi kuukitsidwa kwace?リソースgot-questions
Kodi Yesu ndiye njira yokha yopita Kumwamba?リソースgot-questions
Kodi makhalidwe a Mulungu ndi otani? Kodi Mulungu ali bwanji?リソースgot-questions
Kodi ziweto / nyama zimapita Kumwamba? Kodi ziweto / nyama zili ndi mizimu?リソースgot-questions

TWR360音声twr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

Kodi Baibulo ndilo Mau a Mulungu zoonadi?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)? Kodi ndi cimo kwa Mkristu kumwa zoledzeretsa / vinyo (waini)?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za kupereka ca khumi?자료got-questions
Kodi cipulumutso citheka ndi cikhulupiriro cokha kapena cikhulupiriro ndi zinchito?자료got-questions
Cifukwa ninji sindiyenera kudzipha?자료got-questions
Kodi Cikristu nciani ndipo Akristu amakhulupirira ciani?자료got-questions
Kodi Akristu ayenera kumvera lamulo la mu Cipangano Cakale?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za cikwati pakati pa osiyana mitundu (osiyana khungu)?자료got-questions
Cimacitika nciani potsatira imfa?자료got-questions
Kodi mpikisano wobecha (njuga, kasino, lotare, jakipoti ndi zina) ndi cimo? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mpikisano wobecha?자료got-questions
Kodi cipembedzo coona ndi citi kwa ine?자료got-questions
Kodi cisamaliro cosatha cipezeka mu Baibulo?자료got-questions
Kodi domgosolo la chipulumutso ndilotani / njira ya chipulumutso?자료got-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji cifuniro ca Mulungu mu moyo wanga? Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa zakudziwa cifuniro ca Mulungu?자료got-questions
Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji motsimikiza kuti ndikafa ndidzapita Kumwamba?자료got-questions
Kodi m’Khristu ndi chiyani?자료got-questions
Kodi Mulungu alipo? Pali umboni kuti Mulungu alipo?자료got-questions
Kodi Mulungu ndi oona? Kodi ndingadziwe bwanji kuti Mulungu ndi oona?자료got-questions
Kodi Yesu Khristu ndiye yani?자료got-questions
Kodi Yesu ndi Mulungu? Kodi Yesu ananenapo kuti Iye ndi Mulungu?자료got-questions
Ndingathe bwanji kugonjetsa cimo mu umoyo wanga wa CiKristu?자료got-questions
Ndingakhale bwanji bwino ndi Mulungu?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa kukhala m’cikondi munthu asanakwatire kapena asanakwatiridwe / kumacita zogonana asanakhale m’banja?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kulekana pa banja ndi kukwatiranso kapena kukwatiriwanso?자료got-questions
Mwakhululukidwa? Ndingakhululukidwe bwanji ndi Mulungu?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za madainasosi? Kodi madainasosi alimo mu Baibulo?자료got-questions
Kodi malamulo anai a zauzimu ndi otani?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani za mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha? Kodi mcitidwe wokonda zogonana wa pakati pa akazi kapena amuna okhaokha ndi cimo?자료got-questions
Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali ndani? Kodi mkazi wa Kaini anali mlongo wace?자료got-questions
Kodi ubatizo wa Cikristu ndiwofunikira motani?자료got-questions
Kodi munthu akafa, akhalanso ndi moyo?자료got-questions
Munalandira Moyo Wosatha?자료got-questions
Kodi mphatso yakulankhula mu malilime ndi ciani?자료got-questions
Kodi Baibulo linena ciani pa za kuzitema kapena kuzilembalemba mphini pa thupi kapenanso kuziboola pa thupi?자료got-questions
Zikutanthauza chiyani kuvomera Yesu ngati Mpulumutsi wa umoyo wako?자료got-questions
Kodi baibulo liphunzitsa ciani za Mulungu m’modzi mwa atatu?자료got-questions
Kodi Mzimu Woyera ndani?자료got-questions
Okapulumutsidwa kamodzi, ukhalabe wopulumutsidwa?자료got-questions
Kodi pemphero la munthu ocimwa nciani?자료got-questions
Kodi tanthauzo la moyo nciani?” Kodi ndingapeze bwanji tanthauzo la moyo wanga?자료got-questions
Ndangoyika chikhulupiliro changa mwa Yesu… Tsopano?자료got-questions
Kuzithetsa nyere – Kodi ndi cimo monga mwa Baibulo?자료got-questions
Kodi umulungu wa Yesu upezeka mu Baibulo?자료got-questions

TWR360오디오twr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

首页语言切瓦语

TWR360音频twr360

Chewa, or Nyanja, is a Bantu language spoken in Malawi and a recognised minority in Eastern Zambia and Tete province of Mozambique. The prefix chi- in front of Chewa means "in the manner of". In Malawi, the name was officially changed from Chinyanja to Chichewa in 1968 at the insistence of President Hastings Kamuzu Banda, and is still the name most commonly used in Malawi today. In Zambia, Nyanja is still the preferred name, and Town Nyanja is rather divergent, under the influence of other languages in Lusaka.

About Countries Organizations Collections Search

Find a Bible is a collaborative project of the Forum of Bible Agencies and is created and maintained by the Digital Bible Society.

Acerca de Países Organizaciones Colecciones Buscar

«Find a Bible» es un proyecto colaborativo del Forum of Bible Agencies, creado y mantenido por la Digital Bible Society.

Sobre Países Organizações Coleções Pesquisar

«Find a Bible» é um projeto colaborativo do Forum of Bible Agencies, criado e mantido pela Digital Bible Society.

À propos Pays Organisations Collections Rechercher

«Find a Bible» est un projet collaboratif du Forum of Bible Agencies, créé et maintenu par la Digital Bible Society.

परिचय देश संगठन संग्रह खोजें

«Find a Bible» Forum of Bible Agencies की एक सहयोगी परियोजना है, जिसे Digital Bible Society द्वारा बनाया और संचालित किया जाता है।

حول البلدان المنظمات المجموعات بحث

«Find a Bible» مشروع تعاوني تابع لـ Forum of Bible Agencies، وقد أنشأته وتتولى صيانته Digital Bible Society.

概要 国 団体 コレクション 検索

「Find a Bible」は Forum of Bible Agencies の共同プロジェクトであり、Digital Bible Society が制作・運営しています。

소개 국가 단체 모음 검색

〈Find a Bible〉는 Forum of Bible Agencies의 공동 프로젝트이며, Digital Bible Society가 제작·운영합니다.
